name: Build your first AI data analyst chatbot
description: AI data analyst chatbot: takes a question about your data, fetches transactions from Google Sheets, uses Claude to analyze patterns and generate insights, then posts a formatted analysis to Slack with Block Kit.

source.originalName: Build your first AI data analyst chatbot

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID containing your data

question.description: Your data analysis question (e.g. 'What are the top 5 products by revenue?')

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the analysis

steps.name: Format spreadsheet data for AI analysis
